languages.text: "Таков путь, дитя. Мы грешны, и должно за то платить". {n}Женщина бережно касается плеча юноши.{/n} "Идем же. Дети Искупления заслуживают знать, что уготовила им судьба".

traits.locale_text: "Таков путь, дитя. Мы грешны, и должно за то платить". {n}Женщина бережно касается плеча юноши.{/n} "Идем же. Дети Искупления заслуживают знать, что уготовила им судьба".
traits.speaker: SurvivorLeaderWoman

traits.locale_text: "Таков путь, дитя. Мы грешны, и должно за то платить". {n}Женщина бережно касается плеча юноши.{/n} "Идем же. Дети Искупления заслуживают знать, что уготовила им судьба".
traits.speaker: SurvivorLeaderWoman

languages.text: "Such is the way, child. We are impure, so there is a price we must pay." {n}The woman gently pats the young man on the shoulder.{/n} "Come. Children of Redemption deserve to know what the fate has in store for them."
languages.original_text: "Таков путь, дитя. Мы грешны, и должно за то платить". {n}Женщина бережно касается плеча юноши.{/n} "Идем же. Дети Искупления заслуживают знать, что уготовила им судьба".

traits.locale_text: "Such is the way, child," {n}The woman gently pats the young man on the shoulder.{/n} "We are full of sin, and so we must atone."
traits.speaker: SurvivorLeaderWoman

traits.locale_text: "Such is the way, child," {n}The woman gently pats the young man on the shoulder.{/n} "We are full of sin, and so we must atone."
traits.speaker: SurvivorLeaderWoman

traits.locale_text: "Such is the way, child. We are impure, so there is a price we must pay." {n}The woman gently pats the young man on the shoulder.{/n} "Come. Children of Redemption deserve to know what the fate has in store for them."
traits.speaker: SurvivorLeaderWoman

languages.text: "Das ist der Weg, Kind. Wir sind unrein, also haben wir einen Preis zu zahlen." {n}Die Frau klopft dem jungen Mann sanft auf die Schulter.{/n} "Komm. Die Kinder der Erlösung verdienen es, zu erfahren, was das Schicksal für sie bereithält."
languages.original_text: "Such is the way, child. We are impure, so there is a price we must pay." {n}The woman gently pats the young man on the shoulder.{/n} "Come. Children of Redemption deserve to know what the fate has in store for them."

languages.text: "C'est ainsi, mon enfant. Nous sommes impurs, il y a donc un prix à payer." {n}La femme tapote doucement l'épaule du jeune homme.{/n} "Venez. Les enfants de la Rédemption méritent de savoir ce que le destin leur réserve."
languages.original_text: "Such is the way, child. We are impure, so there is a price we must pay." {n}The woman gently pats the young man on the shoulder.{/n} "Come. Children of Redemption deserve to know what the fate has in store for them."

languages.text: "就是这样，孩子。我们不纯洁，所以必须付出代价。"{n}女人轻轻拍了拍年轻人的肩膀。{/n}"来吧救赎之子理应知道命运为他们准备了什么。"
languages.original_text: "Such is the way, child. We are impure, so there is a price we must pay." {n}The woman gently pats the young man on the shoulder.{/n} "Come. Children of Redemption deserve to know what the fate has in store for them."

languages.text: "Así es el camino, niña. Somos impuros, así que debemos pagar un precio". {n}La mujer palmea suavemente al joven en el hombro.{/n} "Ven. Los hijos de la Redención merecen saber qué les depara el destino".
languages.original_text: "Such is the way, child. We are impure, so there is a price we must pay." {n}The woman gently pats the young man on the shoulder.{/n} "Come. Children of Redemption deserve to know what the fate has in store for them."

languages.text: 「そういうものだ。私たちは不純だから、支払わなければならない代償がある"{n}女性は若者の肩を優しく叩く。{/n}「来なさい。贖罪の子供たちは、運命が何をもたらすかを知るに値する"
languages.original_text: "Such is the way, child. We are impure, so there is a price we must pay." {n}The woman gently pats the young man on the shoulder.{/n} "Come. Children of Redemption deserve to know what the fate has in store for them."

languages.text: "İşte böyle çocuğum. Biz saf değiliz, bu yüzden ödememiz gereken bir bedel var." {n}Kadın genç adamın omzuna hafifçe vurur.{/n} "Gel bakalım. Kefaretin çocukları, kaderin onlar için ne sakladığını bilmeyi hak ediyor."
languages.original_text: "Such is the way, child. We are impure, so there is a price we must pay." {n}The woman gently pats the young man on the shoulder.{/n} "Come. Children of Redemption deserve to know what the fate has in store for them."
